description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux distro build that runs on every push to master and tags matching v*, and on pull requests. The workflow should have concurrent jobs for building on multiple Linux distributions, including Fedora, OpenSUSE Tumbleweed, ArchLinux, and ArchLinux (System), each in its own container. For each job, install git, checkout the code with submodules, install dependencies, and run the build script.
